name: Sofia Novak
summary: Full-stack developer with 4 years building modern web applications using React and Node.js. Strong eye for UI/UX and performance. Experienced in TypeScript, REST and GraphQL APIs, and PostgreSQL databases.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Delivered 8 client web applications from design to production using Next.js and TypeScript
Built reusable component library used across 5 projects, saving ~30% development time
Improved Lighthouse performance scores from avg 62 to 91 across portfolio

experience.title: Frontend Developer
bullets: Developed React SPA for SaaS analytics dashboard with 10k monthly active users
Integrated GraphQL API with Apollo Client, reducing API calls by 45%
